dis_application_view.llm_summary: Lucas Santos is a BR national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by SANSONS CHARTERED ACCOUNTANTS for Teachers of English as a foreign language (SOC 2317). The application states salary £41,909 against the SOC going rate £36,200 and start date 2026-07-01. DIS routes the case to manual review because insufficient bank statement month 2. The officer should inspect the linked evidence and use the RFI flow where further evidence is needed.
